title: Version History
description: Version history and change tracking settings for collaborative notebooks.

enabled.title: Enable Version History
enabled.description: Enable or disable version history tracking for collaborative notebooks

maxVersions.title: Maximum Versions
maxVersions.description: Maximum number of versions to retain in history

retentionDays.title: Retention Period (Days)
retentionDays.description: Number of days to retain version history

diffVisualization.title: Diff Visualization Mode
diffVisualization.description: How to visualize differences between versions

autoSaveInterval.title: Auto-save Interval (seconds)
autoSaveInterval.description: Interval in seconds between automatic version snapshots (0 to disable)

trackOutputs.title: Track Cell Outputs
trackOutputs.description: Whether to include cell outputs in version history
